title: Adding Rows to Table
author: CarlosCommits

comments.author: guggu1
comments.body:
it depends on the environment.

- it works for me running it in Visual Studio Code, on a Raspberry PI, LINUX.
- it does NOT work for me running it in ioBroker (at home automation platform), on the same computer as above, but using ioBroker's javascript adapter (which may have another js engine than Visual Studio Code

CCS

comments.author: guggu1
